channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: NOAA releases 2024-25 winter weather outlook: Here's what to expect
item.description: Depending on where you live in the U.S., this winter could bring a mix of snow and rain or unseasonably warm weather, according to climate experts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, Fox 5

item.title: A father and son are both indicted on murder charges in a mass school shooting in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A grand jury indicted both a father and son on murder charges Thursday in a mass shooting at Apalachee High School in Winder, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indian government employee charged in foiled murder-for-hire plot in New York City
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Justice Department announced criminal charges Thursday against an Indian government employee in connection with a foiled plot to kill a Sikh separatist leader living in New York City.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cissy Houston mourned by Dionne Warwick, politicians and more at longtime church
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Dionne Warwick, BeBe Winans, Darlene Love and a massive choir helped celebrate the life of gospel icon Cissy Houston during a music-filled memorial Thursday in the Duchess of Gospel’s hometown of Newark.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Google Flights adds 'Cheapest' option for travelers who just don't care how they get there
item.description: Google Flights has a new option for immediately finding the “cheapest” flight itinerary, but it may come at a slightly different cost.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oklahoma parents and teachers sue to stop top education official's classroom Bible mandate
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — A group of Oklahoma parents of public school students, teachers and ministers filed a lawsuit Thursday seeking to stop the state's top education official from forcing schools to incorporate the Bible into lesson plans for students in grades 5 through 12.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Travis County judge grants TRO to keep Texas death row inmate Robert Roberson from being executed tonight
item.description: A Texas man was set to be the first person in the U.S. executed for a murder conviction tied to the diagnosis of shaken baby syndrome is facing a lethal injection.
item.dc:creator: Juan A. Lozano, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 7-year-old crashes one school bus into another
item.description: She won't be able to drive for another nine years, but the parents of a Missouri second grader say she's already had her first crash. Seven-year-old Alannah Cheffen, of Independence, said she crashed her school bus into another bus on school grounds.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, KTLA 5

item.title: Liam Payne died from 'multiple traumas,' 'internal and external bleeding,' autopsy reveals
item.description: Officials in Argentina have released a cause of death for Liam Payne, the former One Direction member who died on Wednesday at the age of 31.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 7-year-old crashes one school bus into another during apparent training in Missouri
item.description: She won't be able to drive for another nine years but parents of an Independence second grader say she's already had her first crash.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Uphill battles that put abortion rights on ballots are unlikely to end even if the measures pass
item.description: Voters in nine states are deciding next month whether to add the right to abortion to their constitutions, but the measures are unlikely to dramatically change access — at least not immediately.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mitzi Gaynor, ‘South Pacific’ star, dies at 93
item.description: Mitzi Gaynor, the effervescent dancer and actor who starred as Nellie Forbush in the 1958 film "South Pacific" and appeared in other musicals with Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: La Nina could soon arrive. Here's what that means for winter weather
item.description: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration’s Climate Prediction Center says there is a 60% chance that a weak La Nina event will develop this autumn and could last until March.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Michigan teen facing charges in sextortion case: Deputies
item.description: Deputies say a Michigan teen is facing charges after allegedly pressuring other teenagers to send inappropriate images.
item.dc:creator: Katie Rosendale, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Helene: 'Backbone of America' helping farmers across Southeast who lost billions in crops, land
item.description: Hurricane Helene has devastated farmland and killed livestock across the Southeast. Experts estimate agricultural damages from the hurricane could be billions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 dead, several injured after bridge collapses in Mississippi
item.description: Three people have died and several others were injured after a bridge collapsed in Mississippi on Wednesday, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Smith, KRON4

item.title: Navy finds wreckage of fighter jet that crashed during training in Washington state
item.description: The U.S. Navy located the wreckage Wednesday of a fighter jet that crashed in Washington state during a routine training flight in mountainous terrain. The two crew members onboard remain missing.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge invalidates election rules passed by Trump-backed board in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A Georgia judge has declared that seven new election rules recently passed by the State Election Board are “illegal, unconstitutional and void.” Fulton County Superior Court Judge Thomas Cox issued the order Wednesday after holding a hearing on challenges to the rules.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris leading Trump by 5 points among likely voters: Poll
item.description: Vice President Harris is leading former President Trump by 5 points nationally among likely voters, according to a Marist Poll survey released Wednesday. Harris and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), received 52 percent support, while Trump and his running mate, Sen.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Google Trends 'Frightgeist' lists the most popular Halloween costumes for 2024
item.description: Whether you are unsure about what your Halloween costume should be or want to stand out from the crowd, Google has you covered.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Helene and Milton are both likely to be $50 billion disasters, joining ranks of most costly storms
item.description: Monstrous hurricanes Helene and Milton caused so much complex havoc that damages are still being added up, but government and private experts say they will likely join the infamous ranks of Katrina, Sandy and Harvey as super costly $50-billion-plus killers.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-Las Vegas-area Democratic politician gets at least 28 years in prison for killing reporter
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A former Las Vegas-area Democratic elected official was sentenced Wednesday to serve at least 28 years in Nevada state prison for killing an investigative journalist who wrote articles critical of his conduct in office two years ago and exposed an intimate relationship with a female
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Former Las Vegas-area official sentenced in murder of journalist
item.description: The former public administrator was accused of killing Jeff German after the reporter wrote articles critical of his conduct in office.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, KRON4

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The department will soon implement a "final click to cancel rule," a move that will require sellers to make it "as easy for consumers to cancel their enrollment as it was to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Navy finds wreckage of fighter jet that crashed during training in Washington state
item.description: The U.S. Navy located the wreckage Wednesday of a fighter jet that crashed in Washington state during a routine training flight in mountainous terrain. The two crew members onboard remain missing.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pixel Watch 3: Bigger screen, smarter features
item.description: Google Pixel Watch 3 is going big this year! This time around, there's a new option for a larger screen size—45 millimeters. It feels much roomier than the old screen size, which is still available.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Menendez brothers' family to push for their release as prosecutors review 1989 case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The extended family of Erik and Lyle Menendez will advocate for the brothers' release from prison following the 1989 killings of their parents in Beverly Hills.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Republicans challenge more than 63,000 voters in Georgia, but few removed, AP finds
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — From Georgia's mountains to its Atlantic shore, challenges to the qualifications of voters have rolled in this summer and fall, part of a wide-ranging national effort coordinated by Donald Trump’s allies to enlist Republican activists to remove people they view as suspect from the vot
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY and CHARLOTTE KRAMON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 19 mayoral candidates compete to lead Portland, Oregon, in a race with homelessness at its heart
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — A lot of political changes are coming to Portland, Oregon. The open mayoral race in the state’s most populous city features 19 candidates — all vying to lead after years of growing frustration over homeless encampments.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Carolina man shot, killed outside of his own wedding; family wants answers
item.description: Tyrek Burton, 37, was fatally shot outside his own wedding reception at Barber Park Events Center in Greensboro, North Carolina, over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Elijah Skipper, WGN 9

item.title: Hurricane misinformation stokes fears ahead of election
item.description: The flood of conspiracy theories and rumors following the severe weather in the South is sparking concerns that political figures’ embrace of misinformation is just the beginning as the general election draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Walgreens to close 1,200 US stores
item.description: The plan announced Tuesday includes the closing of 300 stores that had been approved under a previous cost-cutting plan.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Republican lawsuits target rules for overseas voters, but those ballots are already sent
item.description: Trump and his Republican allies contend these ballots could be part of an elaborate scheme to steal the election from him, a claim for which there is no evidence. Their challenge comes as the voters who receive the ballots are increasingly from groups that are presumed to be Democratic.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: FDA shakes up weight loss market as Mounjaro shortage ends
item.description: Federal regulators shook up the booming weight loss drug marketplace when they announced Mounjaro and Zepbound to be no longer in shortage after nearly two years.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, Fox 5

item.title: Tom Donohue, former longtime Chamber of Commerce CEO, dies
item.description: Tom Donohue, who led the U.S. Chamber of Commerce for more than two decades before retiring in 2021, has died, the business lobbying giant announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, Fox 5
